feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: is_sorted_until -- fixing implementation
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_is_sorted_until.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_is_sorted_until.md
index b92c0af1c..fe5152fca 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_is_sorted_until.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_is_sorted_until.md
@@ -137,7 +137,7 @@ struct is_sorted_until_impl {
     auto it = first;
     if (it == last || ++it == last)
       return last;
-    while (it != last && *first < *it)
+    while (it != last && !invoke(comp, invoke(proj, *it), invoke(proj, *first)))
       ++first, ++it;
     return it;
   }
@@ -157,6 +157,7 @@ inline constexpr is_sorted_until_impl is_sorted_until;
 * begin[link /reference/ranges/begin.md]
 * end[link /reference/ranges/end.md]
 * ref[link /reference/functional/ref.md]
+* invoke[link /reference/functional/invoke.md]
 
 ## バージョン
 ### 言語

entry.title: fold_right_last -- fix of template type
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_fold_right_last.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_fold_right_last.md
index aa58a681f..e7b316ded 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_fold_right_last.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_fold_right_last.md
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ namespace std::ranges {
 (1), (2)ともに、以下と等価
 
 ```cpp
-using U = decay_t<invoke_result_t<F&, iter_reference_t<I>, T>>;
+using U = decay_t<invoke_result_t<F&, iter_reference_t<I>, iter_value_t<I>>>;
 if (first == last)
   return optional<U>();
 I tail = ranges::prev(ranges::next(first, std::move(last)));
@@ -164,7 +164,7 @@ template<bidirectional_iterator I, sentinel_for<I> S,
          indirectly-binary-right-foldable<iter_value_t<I>, I> F>
   requires constructible_from<iter_value_t<I>, iter_reference_t<I>>
 constexpr auto fold_right_last(I first, S last, F f) {
-  using U = decay_t<invoke_result_t<F&, iter_reference_t<I>, T>>;
+  using U = decay_t<invoke_result_t<F&, iter_reference_t<I>, iter_value_t<I>>>;
 
   if (first == last) {
     return optional<U>();

entry.title: find_last -- fix type
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_last.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_last.md
index 41a33158c..38c1b5519 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_last.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_last.md
@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ namespace std::ranges {
     - C++26 : 引数として波カッコ初期化`{}`を受け付ける
         ```cpp
         std::vector<T> v;
-        bool found = std::ranges::find_last(r, {a, b});
+        auto found = std::ranges::find_last(r, {a, b});
         ```

entry.title: find_if -- fixing missing return val
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if.md
index bd5d39c34..78883e822 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if.md
@@ -130,6 +130,7 @@ struct find_if_impl {
     for ( ; first != last; ++first)
       if (invoke(pred, invoke(proj, *first)))
         return first;
+    return first;
   }
 
   template<input_range R, class Proj = identity, indirect_unary_predicate <projected<iterator_t<R>, Proj>> Pred>

entry.title: find_if_not -- fixing missing return val
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if_not.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if_not.md
index edee510d5..f73bba791 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if_not.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_if_not.md
@@ -130,6 +130,7 @@ struct find_if_not_impl {
     for ( ; first != last; ++first)
       if (!invoke(pred, invoke(proj, *first)))
         return first;
+    return last;
   }
 
   template<input_range R, class Proj = identity, indirect_unary_predicate <projected<iterator_t<R>, Proj>> Pred>

entry.title: find_end -- fix in sample implementation
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_end.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_end.md
index 8d6310f30..a266ec1f6 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_end.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_find_end.md
@@ -165,11 +165,16 @@ struct find_end_impl {
   template<forward_iterator I1, sentinel_for<I1> S1, forward_iterator I2, sentinel_for<I2> S2, class Pred = ranges::equal_to, class Proj1 = identity, class Proj2 = identity>
     requires indirectly_comparable<I1, I2, Pred, Proj1, Proj2>
   constexpr subrange<I1> operator()(I1 first1, S1 last1, I2 first2, S2 last2, Pred pred = {}, Proj1 proj1 = {}, Proj2 proj2 = {}) const {
+    I1 end1 = ranges::next(first1, last1);
     if (first2 == last2)
-      return last1;
-    I1 result = last1;
-    while ((first1 = search(first1, last1, first2, last2, ref(pred), ref(proj1), ref(proj2))) != last1) {
-      result = first1;
+      return {end1, end1};
+    subrange<I1> result{end1, end1};
+    for (;;) {
+      subrange<I1> found = ranges::search(first1, last1, first2, last2, ref(pred), ref(proj1), ref(proj2));
+      if (found.empty())
+        break;
+      result = found;
+      first1 = found.begin();
       ++first1;
     }
     return result;
@@ -184,7 +189,8 @@ struct find_end_impl {
 
 inline constexpr find_end_impl find_end;
 ```
-* search[link ranges_search.md]
+* ranges::search[link ranges_search.md]
+* ranges::next[link /reference/iterator/ranges_next.md]
 
 ## バージョン
 ### 言語
